launches.rocket: Longest Chinese spacewalk to date. Tasks included installing space debris protec
launches.mission_name: Longest Chinese spacewalk to date. Tasks included installing space debris protection devices and conducting inspections of extravehicular equipment and facilities.

launches.mission_name: Tasks included installing space debris protection devices and conducting inspections of extravehicular equipment and facilities.

launches.mission_name: The two astronauts completed the longest spacewalk in human history with the assistance of the space station's robotic arms and ground-based scientific personnel, completed tasks such as the installat

The cosmonauts ventured outside and installed an x-ray telescope on plain 5 of the Zvezda Service Module, jettisoned an ion radiation probe, retrieved Biorisk, TEST, and two exposure experiments on Zv

launches.notes: Broke world record for most consecutive successful orbital launches (325) and for most consecutive booster landings (267).
